# WhatsApp Bots by Codika

> AI-powered WhatsApp bots for community management. Custom-built bots with admin dashboards for businesses managing communities on WhatsApp.

## Company

- Name: Codika
- Location: Belgium
- Website: https://codika.io
- Product: https://whatsbot.codika.io

## What We Offer

- Custom AI-powered WhatsApp bots (Claude AI by Anthropic)
- Full admin dashboard (members, events, messages, broadcasts)
- Official WhatsApp Business API via Twilio
- Optional self-hosted group connector (Baileys/Evolution API)
- Knowledge base integration (Notion, Google Drive, documents)
- Multi-role bot (admin, resident, community member)

## Pricing

- Bot Setup: EUR 2,000 - 5,000 (one-time)
- Monthly Operations: From EUR 10/month

## Key Features

- AI agents with context and conversation memory
- Member and organization management
- Event management with automated reminders
- Broadcast messaging with delivery tracking
- WhatsApp template management (utility, marketing, authentication)
- GDPR compliant, full data ownership guaranteed
- Multi-language support

## Target Audience

- Community managers
- Associations and non-profits
- Co-living and co-working spaces
- Property managers
- Business networks
- Sports clubs and federations

## Contact

- Email: hello@codika.io
- Demo: Book via Calendly on the website
